title: campe intermedia
intro: Campe intermedia, also known as Mexican evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's seeds and oil have been used to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing, offering health benefits such as improved skin health, reduced pain, and enhanced overall well-being. Campe intermedia can be prepared as an herbal supplement, oil, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including eczema, acne, and skin allergies.
